properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 89/16
BARENTS SEA
SEISMIC SURVEY BY M/V POLARCUS NAILA FROM 22 AUG. 
TOWING 12 SEISMIC CABLES OF 7000 METERS IN LENGTH IN AREA B0UND BY

A. 71-21N 023-45E
B. 71-48N 023-39E
C. 72-00N 027-16E
D. 71-31N 027-14E


REQUEST CLEARANCE 6NM ASTERN AND 3NM AHEAD AND ABEAM.
GUARD VESSELS BRAVO SAPHIRE AND GLOMAR 4 WINDS.
